57d9d3b822c5.plainText: Terms of Use By accessing and using the Bratton Physical Therapy website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms of Use. Please review them carefully. Acceptance of Terms By accessing this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use this website. Medical Disclaimer The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and is not intended as medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of a qualified healthcare provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition. Do not disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of something you have read on this website. If you think you may have a medical emergency, call your doctor or 911 immediately. No Provider-Patient Relationship Use of this website does not establish a provider-patient relationship with Bratton Physical Therapy or any of its therapists. A provider-patient relationship is only established after an in-person evaluation and the completion of appropriate intake paperwork. Website Content We strive to keep our website content accurate and up to date, but we make no warranties or representations about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of any information on this site. Content may be changed or updated without notice. Intellectual Property All content on this website — including text, images, logos, graphics, and design elements — is the property of Bratton Physical Therapy unless otherwise noted. Unauthorized use, reproduction, or distribution of any content is prohibited. Links to Third-Party Sites Our website may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for your convenience only. We do not endorse or assume responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites. Limitation of Liability Bratton Physical Therapy shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use this website, including but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Changes to These Terms We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the website after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. Contact Information If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us: Bratton Physical Therapy 1346 Lindberg Drive Suite 3, Slidell, LA 70458 Phone: (985) 641-5825 Last updated: January 2026
57d9d3b822c5.originalHtml:
Terms of Use

By accessing and using the Bratton Physical Therapy website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms of Use. Please review them carefully.

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use this website.

Medical Disclaimer

The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and is not intended as medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of a qualified healthcare provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition. Do not disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of something you have read on this website.

If you think you may have a medical emergency, call your doctor or 911 immediately.

No Provider-Patient Relationship

Use of this website does not establish a provider-patient relationship with Bratton Physical Therapy or any of its therapists. A provider-patient relationship is only established after an in-person evaluation and the completion of appropriate intake paperwork.

Website Content

We strive to keep our website content accurate and up to date, but we make no warranties or representations about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of any information on this site. Content may be changed or updated without notice.

Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including text, images, logos, graphics, and design elements — is the property of Bratton Physical Therapy unless otherwise noted. Unauthorized use, reproduction, or distribution of any content is prohibited.

Links to Third-Party Sites

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for your convenience only. We do not endorse or assume responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites.

Limitation of Liability

Bratton Physical Therapy shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use this website, including but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the website after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

Contact Information

If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us:

Bratton Physical Therapy
1346 Lindberg Drive Suite 3, Slidell, LA 70458
Phone: (985) 641-5825

Last updated: January 2026
